published_title: 23: Greg Hill says he wouldn't get back into BMX if someone offered me "all the money" in the world
archival_display_title: Greg Hill Rules Out Returning to the BMX Business
summary: The published record frames Greg Hill as unwilling to return to the BMX business even for an extraordinary financial offer. No Short-level transcript was supplied; the parent transcript preserves the matching statement.
claim_status: attributed statement aligned to parent transcript
transcript_status: no Short-level transcript supplied; parent transcript passage aligned
notes: The record concerns a return to the BMX business, not rejection of BMX history or the sport itself.
